title: Martiodendron elatum
taxonomy: Martiodendron elatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae. The genus Martiodendron is a member of the order Malpighiales, which is part of the larger clade Rosidae. This plant is native to tropical Africa and is considered a tree species. The classification of Martiodendron elatum is primarily based on morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis. Further research is necessary to confirm its exact classification within the Achariaceae family.
